channel.title: Deployed Frontity on Now but it just lists a directory
channel.description:
Hi,
Sorry for this very stupid question. It's my first time with React, and my first time to deploy in Zeit.co. So I followed the instructions here: https://docs.frontity.org/installation-and-deploy/deploy-on-now
But after deploying my app, it just listed the folders of the app. It doesn't seem to load the frontity frontend: smmarkets-78f0370x5.now.sh
I don't know where I went wrong. I little help would suffice. :smiley:

item.title: Deployed Frontity on Now but it just lists a directory
item.dc:creator: me11
item.description:
Thank you so much. Haven’t checked my replies here since last year. Frontity has come a long way now and it’s easier to use with more package and themes. Awesome job!

Read full topic
item.source: Deployed Frontity on Now but it just lists a directory

item.title: Deployed Frontity on Now but it just lists a directory
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @me11

There are no stupid questions! Welcome to the forum.

Please check that you have this line in the builds section of your now.json file: "use": "@frontity/now".

We are currently in the process of updating our documentation, so we will revise the deploy-on-now instructions and ensure that they are still accurate.

Meanwhile, if you are still having problems here is an alternative tutorial that you can follow: https://403page.com/how-to-deploy-a-headless-site-for-wordpress-to-the-cloud-for-free-with-frontity-and-zeit-now/

Please do let us know how you get on.

Read full topic
item.source: Deployed Frontity on Now but it just lists a directory

item.title: Deployed Frontity on Now but it just lists a directory
item.dc:creator: me11
item.description:
Hi,

Sorry for this very stupid question. It’s my first time with React, and my first time to deploy in Zeit.co. So I followed the instructions here: https://docs.frontity.org/installation-and-deploy/deploy-on-now

But after deploying my app, it just listed the folders of the app. It doesn’t seem to load the frontity frontend: smmarkets-78f0370x5.now.sh

I don’t know where I went wrong. I little help would suffice.

Read full topic
item.source: Deployed Frontity on Now but it just lists a directory
